sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Second David kha galdo ding tangbang dam-in nong tuangta maw
Heitui vangkhua khimzinna gamah; Khimbang a zing heitui
Vangkhua nibang a taan theihnadingin, Sepna khempeuh

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Second David kha galdo khitui Gospel te aw
Heitui vangkhua ko adingin tuang nong tungta uh maw,
Tangbang damin sepna khempeuh Topa gualzawhna hita hen,
Sepna khempeuh Topa minthanna hita hen!

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kha galdo ding galkap te aw tangbang dam-in nong tungta maw;
Heitui vangkhua khimzinna gamah; Khimbang a zing heitui
Vangkhua nibang a taan theihnadingin, Sepna khempeuh

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Khitui Gospel Gospel te aw tangbang dam-in nong tungta maw,
Heitui vangkhua khimzinna gamah; Khimbang a zing heitui
Vangkhua nibang a taan theihnadingin, Sepna khempeuh
